data.title_en: What to say when leaving the home

items.chapter_title_en: What to say when leaving the home
items.arabic_text: (بِسْمِ اللَّهِ، تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللَّهِ، وَلَاَ حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِاللَّهِ).
items.english_text: (In the name of Allah, I place my trust in Allah, and there is no might nor power except with Allah.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Bismil-lah, tawakkaltu AAalal-lah, wala hawla wala quwwata illa billah.)

items.chapter_title_en: What to say when leaving the home
items.arabic_text: (اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ أَنْ أَضِلَّ، أَوْ أُضَلَّ، أَوْ أَزِلَّ، أَوْ أُزَلَّ، أَوْ أَظْلِمَ، أَوْ أُظْلَمَ، أَوْ أَجْهَلَ، أَوْ يُجْهَلَ عَلَيَّ).
items.english_text: (O Allah, I take refuge with You lest I should stray or be led astray, or slip or be tripped, or oppress or be oppressed, or behave foolishly or be treated foolishly.)(slip: i.e. to commit a sin unintentionally)
items.transliteration: (Allahumma innee aAAoothu bika an adilla aw odal, aw azilla aw ozall, aw athlima aw othlam, aw ajhala aw yujhala AAalay.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Allahumma innee aAAoothu bika an adilla aw odal, aw azilla aw ozall, aw athlima aw othlam, aw ajhala aw yujhala AAalay.)
